'''zatuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cracksman|cracksman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cracksman|cracksman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zatuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zætizhith|zætizhith]] || [[word:zætizhij|zætizhij]] || [[word:zætizhish|zætizhish]] || [[word:zætizhi|zætizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zatutuzhuth|zatutuzhuth]] || [[word:zatutuzhuj|zatutuzhuj]] || [[word:zatutuzhush|zatutuzhush]] || [[word:zatutuzhu|zatutuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zatuzhuth|zatuzhuth]] || [[word:zatuzhuj|zatuzhuj]] || [[word:zatuzhush|zatuzhush]] || [[word:zatuzhu|zatuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zatufzhuth|zatufzhuth]] || [[word:zatufzhuj|zatufzhuj]] || [[word:zatufzhush|zatufzhush]] || [[word:zatufzhuf|zatufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zatuzhuthu|zatuzhuthu]] || [[word:zatuzhuju|zatuzhuju]] || [[word:zatuzhushu|zatuzhushu]] || [[word:zatuzhuku|zatuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zatuzhuth|zatuzhuth]] || [[word:zatuzhuj|zatuzhuj]] || [[word:zatuzhush|zatuzhush]] || [[word:zatuzhu|zatuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zatuzhuthul|zatuzhuthul]] || [[word:zatuzhujul|zatuzhujul]] || [[word:zatuzhushul|zatuzhushul]] || [[word:zatuzhukul|zatuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zatuzhuthuthu|zatuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:zatuzhujuju|zatuzhujuju]] || [[word:zatuzhushushu|zatuzhushushu]] || [[word:zatuzhuku|zatuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zatuzhuthun|zatuzhuthun]] || [[word:zatuzhujun|zatuzhujun]] || [[word:zatuzhushun|zatuzhushun]] || [[word:zatuzhukun|zatuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zatuzhuthuoro|zatuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:zatuzhujuoro|zatuzhujuoro]] || [[word:zatuzhushuoro|zatuzhushuoro]] || [[word:zatuzhukuoro|zatuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
